title: EaseMyTrip Holdings Services is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: EaseMyTrip Holdings Services is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the EaseMyTrip Holdings Services family as a E-commerce Executive in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About EaseMyTrip Holdings Services:
EaseMyTrip Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EaseMyTrip Holdings Services!
